fields.title: Email Basics
fields.description: Teaches the fundamentals of identifying email phishing attempts, focusing on URLs, sender addresses, and false urgency.

fields.title: Mobile & SMS
fields.description: Teaches you about Mobile and SMS Phishing.

fields.title: Voice Phishing (Vishing)
fields.description: Learn how to identify malicious automated phone calls and voicemails.

fields.title: Social Media Phishing
fields.description: Learn to spot fake profiles, malicious direct messages, and deceptive posts designed to steal your information on popular social platforms.
